item.title: Nebius' 1.2 GW Win: A $20B Bet on AI Infrastructure
item.description: Nebius secured approval for a 1.2 GW AI data center in Missouri. With capacity sold out and revenue targets set, here's why investors are paying atten...

item.title: Qualcomm's Robotics Push Could Be Bigger Than the Market Thinks
item.description: Qualcomm’s robotics push hints at a broader transformation story, and the market may be overlooking it and focusing too heavily on smartphone weakness...

item.title: CoreWeave Just Landed a Deal That Signals Where AI Is Headed
item.description: CoreWeave's deal with Perplexity signals its dominance in the high-demand AI inference market, representing the next major wave of industry growth.

item.title: Chaos & Crude: 3 Energy Stocks Built to Thrive in This Market
item.description: The global footprints of Exxon Mobil and Chevron offer stability, while a strategic reset and strong backing position Occidental Petroleum for upside.
